**Title**: Grants-in-Aid from the Centre to states

## Definition

Finance Commission grants + centrally-sponsored scheme grants + special-purpose transfers received by the state from the Central Government. From Rajya Sabha Session 260 Unstarred Q1323 (1 Aug 2023), Col. (5).
